acceptance.metric: Registered soft fusion and court-soft destructive path
acceptance.baseline: The preserved patch added an unregistered positive court_presence >= 0.5 bind gate; w2a still retained court_presence < 0.5 as a destructive geometry trigger.
acceptance.after: Registered 0.4/0.4/0.2 fusion with S >= 0.5 is restored, and court presence is absent from the destructive evidence and drop-reason vocabulary.
acceptance.target: No hard court-presence boundary on binding or destructive paths.

acceptance.baseline: Enrollment source ownership could override stitch veto outside the f44/f87 case.
acceptance.after: Owner source IDs are priority/reservation hints: the owner prepass reserves slots first, while appearance, fusion, and residual-aware veto checks cover owner binding and Layer C.
acceptance.target: No owner rebind across stitch veto without independent appearance provenance; test beyond f44/f87.

acceptance.baseline: Boundary-player, source-ID-reuse, general owner-veto, explicit 7.0 m/s default, and court-soft destructive-path regressions were missing.
acceptance.after: All required regressions pass, including appearance REJECT plus court_presence < 0.5 with adequate persistence/motion remaining UNBOUND.
acceptance.target: Cover every review-demanded binding and destructive-path regression.

acceptance.baseline: The prior lane did not archive/hash the exact stripped scoring input.
acceptance.after: Fixture evidence was regenerated; projection SHA-256 remains 20ea9be75f0a5c8892181611d45953b206e1a99c03236e9b76a02b57d9a11f46 and every SHA256SUMS entry verifies.
acceptance.target: Archive/hash the exact later-scoring projection beside the full output.

acceptance.baseline: The prior round inspected frozen-GT cov4 0.6767, changed owner binding, then rescored to 0.7800.
acceptance.after: No scorer, protected evaluation, frozen gate, or holdout scoring was executed. A judge-facing regression source was inspected but not run, and Wolverine/Burlington remain disclosed as reproduction-only.
acceptance.target: No scorer/protected evaluation execution and explicit contamination disclosure without denying source inspection.
All focused player-selection tests green with MPLBACKEND=Agg.

acceptance.after: REPORT.md includes the required TRK consumes/feeds/invariant row from North Star section 3.1.
The original w2a work stayed inside its fence; w2b additionally touched only the explicitly requested schema and lane artifacts. No commit, branch, or push was created.
acceptance.target: Respect the requested file scope and remain uncommitted on main.

acceptance.after: 3983 passed, 30 failed, 23 skipped in 3074.44s; exit 1. This w2a result was not rerun by w2b.

threed/racketsport/player_selection.py:1436 - make owner continuity an appearance-gated priority/reservation hint that cannot bypass stitch veto.
threed/racketsport/player_selection.py:1626 - recompute veto blocks against final assignments and prevent same-slot Layer-C recovery of veto endpoints.
threed/racketsport/player_selection.py:1963 - restore registered soft fusion without a positive hard court-presence gate.
docs/racketsport/player_selection_report_schema.json:28 - remove the court-presence destructive reason from the schema vocabulary.
scripts/racketsport/select_players_from_pool.py:57 - add scoring-projection output and exact SHA-256 sidecar.
tests/racketsport/test_player_selection.py:1874 - require appearance plus persistence/motion for drops and add the biting low-court UNBOUND regression.
tests/racketsport/test_player_selection.py:2439 - verify projection transformation, exact digest, collisions, and rollback.
runs/lanes/w2a_binding_honest_20260721/cli_fixture_evidence/evidence_manifest.json:1 - regenerate synthetic full output/projection evidence and hashes.
runs/lanes/w2a_binding_honest_20260721/REPORT.md:17 - disclose judge-facing source inspection and correct owner source IDs to priority/reservation hints.

full_suite.failure_notes: Historical w2a exit 1; not rerun by w2b. Failures outside the fence: 18 court/data expectation failures, 8 sandbox-denied socket tests, 1 scaffold-index mismatch, 2 lane-VM startup expectation failures, and 1 storage-policy failure from an unrelated large untracked MP4. Not every failure was proven on clean HEAD.

honest_issues: VERIFIED=0 remains binding; this is not an accuracy or promotion result.
The 20260720 round was scorer-guided, so Wolverine/Burlington cannot serve as independent evidence.
The historical w2a full suite is red and the 30 failures were not all proven pre-existing at clean HEAD; w2b was instructed not to rerun it.
A judge-facing regression source was inspected during w2a, although no judge module, scorer, frozen gate, protected evaluation, or holdout scoring was executed.
The conservative incoming-veto rule can leave a returning true owner unbound even with exact appearance acceptance, trading recall for identity safety.
Synthetic projection evidence proves routing, stripping, deterministic bytes, and digest integrity only.
Four-output publication rolls back caught exceptions but is not process-crash atomic and does not preserve filesystem metadata during rollback.
No commit, branch, or push was created.
next: Freeze code/config/scorer hashes and preregister one fresh Indoor evaluation plus thresholds in heldout_eval_ledger. Outdoor may run once only as a disclosed historical benchmark; obtain another untouched holdout if two fresh clips are required.
